_comment: Alumni, grouped logically for an accordion. 'masters' members carry thesis + placement detail; 'lists' groups are simple name rosters. Everything from the original site is preserved.

members.name: Slavica Porobic (2025–2026)
members.placement: Accepted a position as an Assistant Research Professor at the Vinča Institute of Nuclear Sciences in Belgrade, Serbia

members.name: Keri Sharp (2026)
members.thesis: Atomic layer deposition for boron nitride fiber coatings for C/SiC ceramic-matrix composites
members.placement: Accepted a position as a Simulation and Virtual Development Engineer at Wilson Sporting Goods in Chicago, Illinois

members.name: Eathan Devine (2024)
members.thesis: The thermal and mechanical properties of an additive-manufactured Ti-6Al-4V (Ti64) alloy and a wrought nickel-titanium (NiTi) alloy
members.placement: Accepted a position as a Research Engineer in the Advanced Materials group at the National Institute for Aviation Research in Wichita, Kansas

members.name: Kendall Yetter (2024)
members.thesis: A Surface Remelting Technique for Smoothing AM Surfaces
members.placement: Accepted a position as a Research Metallurgist at IperionX and their R&D group in Salt Lake City, Utah

members.name: Victoria Tucker (2021)
members.thesis: Interlaboratory Round Robin Study of Errors and Best Practices for Scanning Electron Microscope Digital Image Correlation
members.placement: Earned a Ross Fellowship for doctoral studies at Purdue University and joined the Ph.D. program in Materials Science at Purdue
